description_long: This is a classic wooden bed frame featuring a high, ornately carved headboard and a matching footboard, both with decorative paneling and gentle curves. The frame is finished in a muted, weathered gray tone, giving it a vintage or shabby chic appearance. The side rails and slatted base are robust, designed to support a mattress, with the slats evenly spaced for optimal support and ventilation. The legs are short and slightly curved, adding to the traditional aesthetic. There are no visible storage compartments or drawers, and the bed is currently shown without a mattress or bedding. The overall construction suggests durability and a focus on decorative craftsmanship.
description: A vintage-style wooden bed frame with ornate headboard and footboard, finished in weathered gray and featuring a slatted base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed headboard with carved panels and the matching footboard, as well as the slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the slatted support system, and the profile of the headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and footboard, with less visible detail and a solid panel appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the slatted base and the decorative side rails.
